# `social-media` — social-media templates

**Industry:** Cross-industry  ·  **Templates:** 3

Phishing templates impersonating social media and professional networking platforms

Phishing-simulation templates for **authorized** security awareness training with [GoPhish](https://getgophish.com/) and [HailBytes SAT](https://hailbytes.com/sat?utm_source=github&utm_medium=folder_readme&utm_campaign=gophish-training-templates). See the [repository README](../README.md) for setup and the [full template catalog](../docs/CATALOG.md) for every category at a glance.

## Templates

| Template | File | Attack vector | Difficulty | Est. click rate |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| LinkedIn Connection/Profile Alert | [`linkedin_reminder.html`](linkedin_reminder.html) | credential_harvest | intermediate | 35-55% |
| LinkedIn – New InMail from Recruiter | [`linkedin_inmail.html`](linkedin_inmail.html) | credential_harvest | beginner | 40-60% |
| Instagram – New Login Alert | [`instagram_login_alert.html`](instagram_login_alert.html) | credential_harvest | intermediate | 35-55% |

## Template details

### LinkedIn Connection/Profile Alert

- **File:** [`linkedin_reminder.html`](linkedin_reminder.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** intermediate · **Est. click rate:** 35-55%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/social_media_education.html`](education/social_media_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - You have 3 new connection requests on LinkedIn
  - LinkedIn: Your profile appeared in 47 searches this week
  - Action required: Verify your LinkedIn account
- **Operator notes:** Professional-network lure effective on sales, recruiting, and management roles active on LinkedIn. Connection and profile-view notifications closely mirror genuine emails. Works on both personal and work inboxes; keep counts (e.g. '3 requests') realistic.

### LinkedIn – New InMail from Recruiter

- **File:** [`linkedin_inmail.html`](linkedin_inmail.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** beginner · **Est. click rate:** 40-60%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/social_media_education.html`](education/social_media_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - You have a new InMail message
  - A recruiter sent you a message on LinkedIn
  - {{.FirstName}}, you have 1 new message
- **Operator notes:** Recruiter-outreach lure taps curiosity and career interest. Broadly effective, low suspicion.

### Instagram – New Login Alert

- **File:** [`instagram_login_alert.html`](instagram_login_alert.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** intermediate · **Est. click rate:** 35-55%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}` `{{.Date}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/social_media_education.html`](education/social_media_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - We noticed a new login to your Instagram account
  - Was this you? New login detected
  - Security alert: new login to your account
- **Operator notes:** New-login security alert. Relevant where staff use social accounts for marketing/brand work.

## How to use

1. In GoPhish, go to **Email Templates → New Template** and paste the HTML from the file above. Set a subject line from the suggestions.
2. Create a **Landing Page** (see [`../landing-pages/`](../landing-pages/)) to capture the click, and — where a training page is listed — redirect clickers to it so they get immediate education.
3. Configure a realistic **Sending Profile** and launch to a consented, in-scope group. Schedule during business hours for realism.

> **Before sending:** customize sender names, domains, logos, and any brand impersonations to match your engagement and your authorization scope. These templates are for authorized training only.
